messages.text: Should we do per-seat or flat team pricing?
Agreed. Aligning with competitor analysis too.
We need to migrate from Postgres 14 to 16. Big bang or rolling?
Rolling. We can use logical replication to avoid downtime.
Let's do rolling with a 2-week canary on the read replicas first.

decision: Rolling migration with 2-week canary on read replicas

messages.text: Should we build a native mobile app or improve the responsive web?
Our mobile traffic is 15% and all internal. Responsive web covers it.
Agree — responsive improvements are faster and cheaper.

decision: Invest in responsive web, defer native mobile app

messages.text: Datadog costs are spiking. Should we switch to Grafana Cloud or self-host?
Self-host is a maintenance burden we can't afford. Grafana Cloud is half the cost.
Go with Grafana Cloud. Revisit self-hosting when we have a dedicated platform team.

decision: Switch from Datadog to Grafana Cloud for observability

messages.text: We need a policy on vetting new npm packages. Too many transitive deps.
Proposal: max 3 new direct deps per PR, all must have >1k weekly downloads.
Add: no deps with unresolved CVEs. I'll set up socket.dev scanning.

decision: Max 3 new direct deps per PR, >1k weekly downloads, no unresolved CVEs, socket.dev scanning enabled
